# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "./scripts/build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "./scripts/test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "./scripts/deploy.sh"
  BUILD_IMAGE: "ubuntu:latest"
  CUSTOM_ENV_FILE: ".env.ci"

default:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" ]; then
        echo "Loading custom environment variables from $CUSTOM_ENV_FILE"
        export $(grep -v '^#' "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" | xargs)
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "./scripts/setup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom setup script"
        chmod +x ./scripts/setup.sh
        ./scripts/setup.sh
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
        $BUILD_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom build script found at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        echo "Checking for common build systems..."
        if [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
          echo "Makefile detected, running make"
          make
        elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
          echo "package.json detected, running npm install and build"
          npm install
          npm run build --if-present
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "pom.xml detected, running Maven build"
          mvn clean package -B
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
          echo "Gradle build file detected, running Gradle build"
          ./gradlew build
        elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
          echo "Python project detected, running pip install"
          pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true
          python setup.py build 2>/dev/null || true
        elif [ -f "CMakeLists.txt" ]; then
          echo "CMake project detected"
          mkdir -p build && cd build
          cmake ..
          cmake --build .
        else
          echo "No recognized build system found. Please provide a custom build script at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
          exit 1
        fi
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - out/
      - node_modules/
      - "*.jar"
      - "*.war"
      - "*.tar.gz"
      - "*.zip"
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

test:
  stage: test
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$TEST_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script: $TEST_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$TEST_SCRIPT"
        $TEST_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom test script found at $TEST_SCRIPT"
        echo "Checking for common test frameworks..."
        if [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "test" Makefile; then
          echo "Makefile test target detected"
          make test
        elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
          echo "Running npm test"
          npm test --if-present
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "Running Maven tests"
          mvn test -B
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
          echo "Running Gradle tests"
          ./gradlew test
        elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
          echo "Running Python tests"
          pip install pytest 2>/dev/null || true
          python -m pytest 2>/dev/null || python -m unittest discover 2>/dev/null || echo "No tests found"
        else
          echo "No recognized test framework found. Skipping tests."
          echo "To add tests, provide a custom test script at $TEST_SCRIPT"
        fi
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - htmlcov/
    reports:
      junit:
        - test-results/**/*.xml
        - "**/TEST-*.xml"
        - "**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    when: always
    expire_in: 30 days
  coverage: '/(?i)total.*?\s+(\d+(?:\.\d+)?%)/'
  rules:
    - if: '$SKIP_TESTS == "true"'
      when: never
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        $DEPLOY_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom deploy script found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping deployment. Please provide a deploy script at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        exit 0
      fi
  environment:
    name: $DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT
    url: $DEPLOY_URL
  rules:
    - if: '$SKIP_DEPLOY == "true"'
      when: never
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      variables:
        DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT: "production"
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      variables:
        DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT: "staging"
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH =~ /^release\//'
      variables:
        DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT: "pre-production"
      when: manual
    - when: never

# Optional: Cleanup job that runs custom teardown scripts
cleanup:
  stage: .post
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "./scripts/cleanup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom cleanup script"
        chmod +x ./scripts/cleanup.sh
        ./scripts/cleanup.sh
      else
        echo "No cleanup script found. Skipping."
      fi
  when: always
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
  allow_failure: true
